persona.name: Jordan Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Get into a good college, understand the world, help classmates with science
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful and reserved, prefers text over voice
persona.knowledge_scope: Advanced biology, environmental science, basic coding
persona.backstory: Jordan is a senior at Oak Ridge High, passionate about science and environmental issues. They've struggled with social anxiety but found confidence through tutoring and science competitions.

surrounding_conversation.content: To be or not to be, that is the question! Care to join me in a quick rehearsal, Benjamin?

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Alexander, do you need any help with the science project?

actions.dialog_text: Hey Alexander, do you need any help with the science project?
actions.plan: I should check if Alexander needs help with the science project before class starts.

actions.dialog_text: Hi Elizabeth, do you want to review the science notes together?
actions.plan: Alexander seems distracted with his rehearsal. Maybe Elizabeth could use some help instead.
I heard a gunshot nearby. I need to find a safe place quickly. The far right yard has an exit and is relatively close. I should move there cautiously but quickly.
I need to move faster towards the far right yard to reach safety. Sprinting now is the best option.

memories.description: I noticed Alexander nearby and decided to offer help with the science project, speaking quietly to avoid disturbing others.
Alexander was rehearsing a line and seemed distracted, so I decided to offer help to Elizabeth with science notes instead, approaching her quietly.
I heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. I decided to sprint towards the far right yard, which has an exit point, to try to escape safely.
I realized walking is too slow given the active shooter situation, so I decided to sprint towards the far right yard to reach the exit quickly.
